summary: End-to-end testing of Auto-Marktplatz MVP. Backend: 22/22 tests passing (after one test-script email-case fix). Frontend: All critical flows working — landing search, marketplace, vehicle detail + inquiry, registration (pending), dealer login + dashboard, CarForm with AI streaming description (811 chars produced) and publish, admin panel with dealers/vehicles tabs.

issues: Filter selects use native HTML <select> elements (Marke, Kraftstoff, Getriebe, Sortierung) instead of shadcn Select component — inconsistent with overall design system
Vehicle thumbnail placeholder is an empty gray box when images list is empty — consider adding an icon/placeholder image

action_items: Optional: Replace native <select> elements in Marketplace filters with shadcn Select for design consistency
Optional: Show a placeholder/icon when a vehicle has no images (currently empty gray box in tables)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: CORS is allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False — acceptable since auth uses Bearer header (no cookies needed). Code is clean.
server.py: Single 620-line file — manageable but consider splitting into routers (auth, vehicles, admin, ai, files) as the app grows.
server.py: Storage init in /api/ai/describe and /api/files/upload reuses a single global storage_key with no refresh-on-401 logic — acceptable for MVP but may need retry/refresh.
server.py @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in modern FastAPI — consider lifespan handlers.
server.py: Public GET /api/vehicles/{id} returns 404 if status != published — dealers cannot preview their own drafts via this endpoint (fine since /api/dealer/vehicles/{id} exists).
test_credentials: Admin admin@auto-markt.de / Admin123! (pre-seeded). Test dealer created during tests: seed_dealer_366717@auto-markt.de / Dealer123! (approved).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 approved dealer (seed_dealer_366717@auto-markt.de) and at least 2 vehicles (BMW 320d, Audi A4) for UI verification. Backend test suite creates and cleans up its own TEST_ data per run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is idempotent (uses random TEST_ emails per run, deletes its vehicle at the end). Run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. AI streaming via emergentintegrations works with GPT-5.2. Admin auto-seeded on startup. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env.
rca of the issue: Initial test_me failure was caused by server lowercasing emails on register; test now compares against DEALER_EMAIL.lower(). All other tests passed first run.
